raw_consumer_statement: Card was used for unauthorized transaction totaling XXXX USD. I called Citi while transaction were still pending and notified them that while I had my wallet, my phone was lost/stolen at a convention in XXXX. Theres a phone number in the merchant and when dialed it is just a personal voicemail, and the company XXXX XXXX seems to be a XXXX XXXX of some sort for online gaming as the charge. Citi denied my claim without giving me additional information and stated it was my fault.
